summary: AP Validation Integration feature fully tested. All 9 backend API tests pass. Frontend verified: APValidationPanel displays on document detail with validation state, checks summary, blocking issues, warnings, and re-validate button. Queue page has Validation column with pass/warn/fail badges. Workflow Events timeline shows validation.completed events. Freight G/L button opens batch classification dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: APValidationService correctly integrated into auto_resolution_service._process_document() after freight GL routing
Validation runs for AP_VALIDATION_DOC_TYPES: AP_Invoice, Freight_Invoice, Carrier_Invoice
BC Write Guard confirmed BLOCKED - read-only safety verified
Derived states correctly set: fail -> needs_review/manual, pass -> ready/assisted
seed_data_creation: None - used existing documents including c3bf1459-e48d-4905-a813-84b02386b9c4 (AP_Invoice) and 98695c83-a7f3-495f-ac8d-bb5405c55a63 (freight carrier)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AP Validation Integration complete. Key endpoints: POST /api/ap-validation/validate/{doc_id} (manual trigger), GET /api/ap-validation/status/{doc_id} (get status). APValidationPanel shows on document detail for AP-relevant doc types. Queue table has 'Validation' column. Validation runs automatically in auto-resolution pipeline after freight GL for AP_Invoice, Freight_Invoice, Carrier_Invoice types. Results stored as ap_validation_result on document. Events emitted: validation.started, validation.completed, validation.failed, validation.warning_detected. Most docs show 'fail' because vendor matching against BC production is strict.

POST /api/ap-validation/validate/{doc_id.evidence: Returns validation_state, checks array, blocking_issues, warnings. Doc c3bf1459-e48d-4905-a813-84b02386b9c4 returns state=fail with vendor_resolution check failing

GET /api/ap-validation/status/{doc_id}.evidence: Returns validation_state, validation_passed, validation_errors, validation_warnings, validation_summary, derived_workflow_state, derived_automation_state

POST /api/ap-validation/validate for fre.evidence: Doc 98695c83-a7f3-495f-ac8d-bb5405c55a63 validates as AP type, returns validation result

GET /api/bc/write-guard/status.evidence: write_enabled=false, status='blocked' - BC writes are BLOCKED (read-only safety)

Idempotency.evidence: Calling validate twice returns same validation_version and state

Backwards compatibility.evidence: Documents without ap_validation_result still display correctly in queue and detail pages

Frontend: APValidationPanel on document.evidence: Panel shows validation state badge (Validation Failed), 5 required checks (vendor resolved, invoice number, date, amount, duplicate), blocking issues, warnings

Frontend: APValidationPanel Re-validate.evidence: data-testid='ap-validate-btn' triggers validation and refreshes display

Frontend: Queue page Validation column.evidence: Table header 'Validation' present, cells show pass/warn/fail badges with colored backgrounds

Frontend: Validation events in timeline.evidence: 16 events including multiple 'Validation › Completed' from ap_validation_manual service

Frontend: Freight G/L button.evidence: Button visible in queue page header, opens BatchFreightClassifyDialog

Auto-resolution pipeline integration.evidence: Workflow events show Reference Resolve -> Freight GI Classified -> Validation Completed sequence confirming AP validation runs after freight GL in pipeline

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - AP validation writes to MongoDB, BC write guard confirms BC writes are BLOCKED
